---
title: "warden.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/warden.ts"
loc: 65
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.30
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 5.08
overall_score: 5.25
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [CompiledGraph](file://./compiler.js)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `customLedgerPath`
- `Warden`
- `toxicSectors`
- `gravity`
- `logic`
- `ledger`
- `dir`
